nodes.context: Criminal organization that served as armed wing for Sinaloa Cartel and later Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, then independent.
Mexican drug cartel; Los Negros was once its armed wing.
Sinaloa splinter gang; Los Negros became its armed wing after switching alliances.
Gang from Nuevo Laredo; remnants formed Los Negros.
Gulf Cartel's armed wing; Los Negros was formed to counter them.
Prison gang employed by Los Negros to carry out murders and other illegal activities.
Gang employed by Los Negros to carry out murders and other illegal activities.
Mexican drug cartel; rival of Los Negros and Sinaloa Cartel in Nuevo Laredo.
Criminal organization; listed as ally of Los Negros in infobox.
Mexican drug cartel; listed as rival of Los Negros in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Negros ('The Black Ones') was a criminal organization that was once the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Los Negros was the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: after a switch of alliances, became the armed wing of the Sinaloa splinter gang, the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel
edges.context: Los Negros became the armed wing of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2010 it went independent and had been contesting the control of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.context: Los Negros contested control of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel after going independent.

edges.evidence_quote: The group was originally formed from the remnants of the Los Chachos gang from Nuevo Laredo
edges.context: Los Negros was formed from remnants of Los Chachos.

edges.evidence_quote: to counter Los Zetas gang and government security forces.
edges.context: Los Negros was formed to counter Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Negros had been known to employ gangs such as Mexican Mafia and MS-13 to carry out murders and other illegal activities.
edges.context: Los Negros employed Mexican Mafia for murders and other illegal activities.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Negros had been known to employ gangs such as Mexican Mafia and MS-13 to carry out murders and other illegal activities.
edges.context: Los Negros employed MS-13 for murders and other illegal activities.

edges.evidence_quote: Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, was at the center of a war between the Gulf Cartel's Los Zetas and the Sinaloa Cartel's Los Negros.
edges.context: Los Negros was at war with the Gulf Cartel (via Los Zetas) in Nuevo Laredo.
Israeli Mafia is listed as an ally of Los Negros in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas
edges.context: La Familia Cartel is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas
edges.context: Los Zetas is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas
edges.context: MS-13 is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas
edges.context: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.
